creator: gnats-admin@FreeBSD.org
text:
The BANGBUG (Bangalore BSD Users group)
  Serving FreeBSD, NetBSD and OpenBSD users in and around Bangalore India.
  Meets monthly.
  Promotes the use of *BSD throughout the India, and acts as an information center for all *BSD users.

  site is http://www.bangbug.org

  president is oliver@bangbug.com
